agent2 (Round 1 summarized): The cricothyroid is unique as it also receives some innervation via an alternative pathway involving the external branch of the superior laryngeal nerve; hence none of these listed options can be excluded based strictly upon their exclusive reliance or non-reliance on just one type of nerve for full function. \boxed{\text{cricothyroid}} To clarify directly addressing your requirements succinctly while focusing clinically significant aspects,

The cricothyroid differs because part of its innervation originates through both branches of the superior laryngeal nerve alongside typical recurrent laryngeal involvement whereas others do purely with RLN ensuring no single choice fits perfectly under strict criteria set forth implying a nuanced understanding required beyond simple binary inclusion/exclusion logic.\boxed{\text{Crico thyoid}}
In summary,
- Cricothyroid has dual innervation including from outside recurrence making exclusion challenging per requirement
-\boxed{\text{Crico Thyroid}}. Answer choice: A
